model.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "traffic" FROM "raw_24h"."netflow" WHERE time > now() - 30m AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.5[2-4]\./

annotations.description:
Total MIIX traffic exceeded 50 MB in the last 30 minutes during off-hours (22:00-06:00 Asia/Bangkok).

Total traffic: {{ $values.B }} bytes
Threshold: 52428800 bytes (50 MB)

Action:
- Check the Top Users panel on the dashboard
- Investigate the source IP
- Verify if this is legitimate (scheduled backup) or not

model.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "current" FROM "raw_24h"."netflow" WHERE time > now() - 15m AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(6[4-9]|[7-8][0-9]|9[0-5])$/
SELECT mean("in_bytes") AS "baseline_5m" FROM "agg_5m_7d"."netflow_5m" WHERE time > now() - 7d AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(6[4-9]|[7-8][0-9]|9[0-5])$/
